data.body: Fix implemented + live-verified in PR #36 (auto-merge armed). Outbound: _mutation_to_batch_dict now surfaces links + update_one dispatches set_relationship with dedup probe. Inbound: new get_issuelinks_map + fetcher enrichment (fixes inbound visibility AND outbound re-emission churn). RED->GREEN unit tests in test_link_sync.py; full reconciler suite 1004 passed. Live on REB-413/414/415 (deleted): blocks both directions now sync, idempotent, parent regression-clean.
